set.body: many_lm defaults include_fitted/include_residuals to FALSE (hot-path economy), so fit$sigma2[1:3] returns numeric(0)[1:3] = NA NA NA with no hint. First-contact footgun (was in the README quick start). Options: lazy accessor that computes sigma2 on demand from the cached qr, a NULL-with-message active binding, or documenting prominently. README fixed to pass include_residuals=TRUE; the object-level ergonomics remain.
set.title: fit$sigma2 / fit$rss silently empty unless include_residuals=TRUE
